problem: What enzyme or organism efficiently degrades all plastic types at scale?
hypothesis: Perovskite crystal structure optimization may resolve What enzyme or organism efficiently degrades all plastic types at scale? by activating at the molecular level.

experiment.protocol: In vitro biocompatibility assay with 24 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
